# Real World Comics — Astralnaut Studios

> A digital comics subscription platform from Streamwalkers Corporation (publishing under the Astralnaut Studios and Real World Comics imprints) — three serialized properties on a weekly tier-staggered cadence.

## Properties
- Battlefield Atlantis — hard sci-fi space opera
- Children of Aquarius — esoteric thriller / disclosure-era religious mysticism
- Darker Ages — dark medieval fantasy (October 2026)

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of the slate, weekly cadence, and subscriber model.
- [Battlefield Atlantis](/battlefield-atlantis): Series page with first-act pages, characters, and factions.
- [Children of Aquarius](/children-of-aquarius): Series page with first-act pages and drop schedule.
- [Darker Ages](/darker-ages): Pre-launch teaser for October 2026 release.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Reader, Initiate, and Patron tiers with pricing and benefits.
- [Adaptation Rights](/industry): IP rights statement for film, TV, animation, streaming, video game, and audio drama.

## Access model
- Free first-act pages (9 to 9.5 per issue) are unrestricted
- Paid pages release Tuesday (Patron), Wednesday (Initiate), Thursday (Reader)
- Tiers: Reader $4.99/mo, Initiate $9.99/mo, Patron $24.99/mo

## Rights
All properties 100% owned by Streamwalkers Corporation. Available for film, TV,
animation, streaming, video game, and audio drama adaptation under NDA.
Contact: streamwalkersceo@gmail.com
